<meta charset="utf-8">
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;" id="docs-internal-guid-a9dfaf3a-7fff-72bc-937d-94b8de4ee8b4">For this to</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#ff9900;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">work in the texts the texts need to be processed to parse</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">those tags and</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">request the</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">titles of these entries</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"></span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">via single requests on</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">the</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#ff0000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">autoupdate</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">.</span>



  <!---------------------------- background color and strikethrought >

  <meta charset="utf-8">
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;" id="docs-internal-guid-3b35f4cf-7fff-f927-3cea-9bc113f929d1">I hope that the plugin</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">author will continue to</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#38761d;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">maintain</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#38761d;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">and update</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">the plugin.</span>



  <!---------------------------- background color, italics, bold, underline, color >

<meta charset="utf-8">
<p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;text-align: justify;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:12pt;" id="docs-internal-guid-babd95f2-7fff-f6af-f1a9-3d0f08a71a22">
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">For this to</span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#ff9900;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">work in the texts the texts need to be processed to parse</span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">those tags and</span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">request the</span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:underline;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">titles of these entries</span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;"></span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">via single requests on</span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">the</span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#ff0000;background-color:#00ffff;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">autoupdate</span>
  <span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">.1 space</span>
</p>
<br />
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">I hope that the plugin</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">author will continue to</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#38761d;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:line-through;-webkit-text-decoration-skip:none;text-decoration-skip-ink:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">maintain</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:#38761d;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">and update</span>
<span style="font-size:12pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#000000;background-color:transparent;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;text-decoration:none;vertical-align:baseline;white-space:pre;white-space:pre-wrap;">the plugin.</span>
